title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
author: google-ai-blog
raw_description: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
summary: 谷歌宣布在阿拉巴马州杰克逊县投资15亿美元，扩建其数据中心园区，以加强AI基础设施和云服务能力。
analysis_note: 内容为AI基础设施投资，与LLM领域间接相关，但技术深度一般，评分中等。
